response.original_title: เลือนลบเส้นกั้นระหว่างใจ
response.overview: Gorya's peaceful life is gone when Prawfah, her roommate, brings her nosy sister Ingdao to stay with her. Ingdao has secretly liked Gorya since she was a child, so moving into the same house feels like a dream.  But things are complicated- their status of "phi-nong" makes Ingdao too scared to share her feelings, and at the same time she has to deal with Kirin, a friend who's also trying to flirt with Gorya, too.  As Ingdao and Gorya grow closer, how will both of them handle their feelings? What does life look like together amidst moments of arguing, but also periods of joy and laughter?
response.title: Borderless Line

results.name: Borderless Line FULL MOVIE Girl Love (SUBT)
